title: OWO Integration
description: This project adds integration to the OWO Skin haptic suit, using EMS to stimulate a variety of different sensations. all can be customized by the user.
body:
OWO Integration Mod

This mod works with the OWO Skin to make you feel like you are really in the game. It can make you feel things like a bee sting or a big blast from the Wardens sonic boom in Minecraft.

The main idea of this project is to make an customizable connection between Minecraft and the OWO haptic system. This gives players control over how they feel things in the game.

Core Features :

* Advanced Body & Muscle Hit Detection
The mod can tell where you get hit so you feel it in the right place. This makes the game feel more real.

* Custom Scripting Language
You can make your rules for how the mod makes you feel things. You can decide how different things in the game make you feel.

* Editable Player Anatomy Regions
You can choose which parts of your body feel things when you play the game. You have control over this.

* Configurable Calculations
You can change how the mod calculates things like how strong a sensation is. You can make it just right for you.

* Preset System
You can save your settings and load them later. This makes it easy to switch between ways of playing.

* Sensations Manager
This is like a control center for all the sensations. It helps them work together.

Get an OWO Skin :
To use this mod you need an OWO Skin. You can get one, at:
https://owogame.com/

you can read the DSL Docs here :
[DSL Doc](https://github.com/ImBoyYoGG/OWOIntegration-Minecraft-1.21.11-Release/blob/main/DSL)

try Sebasphere's OWO Integration mod :
https://modrinth.com/mod/owocraft
